---
title: "G0LFT"
---
<img src="images/main_logo.png" class="centered-image">

## Welcome

I’m Dr Ian Henry a licensed UK radio amateur and member of [Cambridge and District Amateur Radio Club (CDARC)](https://www.cdarc.org.uk/). I'm also a member of the [Radio Society of Great Britain (RSGB)](https://rsgb.org/) and a published author in the RSGB magazine [RadCom](https://rsgb.org/main/publications-archives/radcom/), with an article titled "Understanding FT8 through DNA-sequencing parallels" (May 2026).  If you have found your way here through reading this article, please check out my [blog post](/blog-posts/2026-04-25-ft8_dna_radcom.html) on the subject.

If you’d like to get in touch, collaborate, or talk radio, you can find contact details in the footer.

## Teaching, learning, and amateur radio

This site brings together reflective writing, theory, and practical guides
focused on teaching, SDR, and modern amateur radio practice.

You’ll find:

- blog posts exploring ideas and experiences
- theory-focused writing on learning and SDR
- practical guides for applying those ideas in practice
